news.headline: Fed Chair Powell releases a statement saying he met with President Trump today at the White House, at the President’s invitation. Powell says he did not discuss expectations for monetary policy and policy will depend on incoming economic information.

news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, home support workers who are part of CUPE 3953 and employed by the VON of Cumberland County have approved a strike mandate. The workers, who provide essential care services, voted in favor of taking strike action if necessary. This decision was made following negotiations with their employer.CUPE 3953 represents the workers in question, and they play a vital role in the community. The specific number of workers involved and the margin by which the strike mandate was approved were not disclosed. This development could potentially impact the provision of home support services in the region.
news.headline: CUPE 3953 home support workers in Cumberland County vote 100% in favor of strike mandate against VON.

news.summary: Wall Street saw a slight increase by midday Thursday, with Nvidia Corp. leading the market with a 4.3% rise after reporting better-than-expected earnings. The S&P 500 was up 0.3% at 5,900, the Nasdaq 100 gained 0.5%, and the Dow Jones was flat. The first-quarter U.S. GDP shrank 0.2%, compared to the previous quarter's growth of 2.4%, due to slower consumer spending and higher imports before the impact of tariffs. Initial jobless claims for the week ending May 24 surged to 240,000, surpassing expectations. This news and more can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stocks rose post-Trump tariffs suspension; Nvidia soars to 3-month high. Bitcoin below $107K. Market stats: S&P 500 +0.3%, Nasdaq 100 +0.5%, Dow Jones flat. GDP shrank 0.2% in Q1, jobless claims spike to 240,000. 📈📉 #MarketNews

news.summary: Lenovo and Motorola Mobility, a Lenovo subsidiary, have collaborated with the FIFA Club World Cup 2025™. Motorola, under the Lenovo banner, has been designated as the Official FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ Smartphone Partner. This partnership aims to leverage the prestigious club football event to enhance brand visibility worldwide. The FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ will be held in the United States commencing on June 14, heralding an exciting era in international club football. 32 teams will compete in this tournament.
news.headline: Lenovo & Motorola partner with FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ as official smartphone sponsor. Event to take place in the US.Characters: 102

news.summary: A recent program is offering schools the opportunity to reduce energy expenses significantly and stimulate economic development while also generating employment opportunities. The Clean Energy Fund of Texas (CEFTX) is encouraging higher education institutions, with a focus on Minority-Serving Institutions, to submit proposals for financial support. This initiative aims to drive positive change by leveraging clean energy solutions, with the potential to make a substantial impact on the state's economy.
news.headline: CEFTX urges Minority-Serving Institutions to apply for funding to lead in slashing energy costs and creating jobs.

news.summary: Veeva Systems Inc. (NYSE: VEEV) exceeded expectations in their first quarter earnings report, with adjusted earnings per share coming in at $1.97, higher than the estimated $1.77. The company saw quarterly sales of $759 million, a 17% increase compared to the previous year, surpassing the projected $731.91 million. CFO Brian Van Wagener noted the company's achievement of their 2025 revenue goal and progress towards their 2030 target of doubling it. For the upcoming fiscal second quarter ending July 31, Veeva anticipates total revenue in the range of $766 million to $769 million, with Street expectations at $765.34 million. Non-GAAP operating income is projected to fall between $335 million and $337 million.
news.headline: Veeva Systems posts Q1 earnings of $1.97 per share, beats estimate of $1.77. Quarterly sales reach $759 million (+17% YoY). Future outlook positive.

news.summary: Tejon Treating & Carbon Solutions (Tejon), a midstream company from Texas, revealed the successful expansion of the Mongoose Gas Plant and related gathering infrastructure in Midland to cater to third-party gas. The expansion project, completed on May 29, 2025, signifies a key milestone for the company as they can now handle a larger volume of gas from external sources. This enhancement is expected to boost their operational capacity significantly in terms of gas processing and transportation services.
news.headline: Tejon Treating expands Mongoose Gas Plant in Midland Basin to accommodate third party gas.

news.summary: In Panama City on May 29, 2025, Banco Latinoamericano de Comercio Exterior, S.A. - Bladex (NYSE: BLX) has entered a strategic partnership with Silver Birch Finance, a global company specialized in providing working capital solutions. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both entities, combining Bladex's expertise in trade finance with Silver Birch's proficiency in advisory services. The partnership aims to enhance working capital solutions for businesses and facilitate international trade. This move highlights the growing importance of innovative financial strategies in the current market landscape.
news.headline: Bladex (NYSE: BLX) partners with Silver Birch to boost working capital financing for LatAm businesses.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Corelight, a leading provider of network detection and response (NDR) solutions, declared that it has been recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant. The evaluation was centered on the company's vision and execution capabilities. Corelight, which is experiencing rapid growth, continues to solidify its position in the market.
news.headline: Corelight named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for NDR, reflecting vision and execution. SAN FRANCISCO, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: A company known as VulnCheck has revealed plans for THREATCON1, a groundbreaking conference aimed at fostering collaboration in combatting new threats. Scheduled for September 21-22, 2025, at Carahsoft Headquarters in Reston, VA, this event invites submissions from researchers, analysts, and cybersecurity professionals through the official conference website. Described as more than just a typical security gathering, THREATCON1 is heralded as a unique movement by Thomas Bain.
news.headline: VulnCheck announces THREATCON1 conference to fight emerging threats, to be held on Sept 21-22, 2025 in Reston, VA.

news.summary: In Wyalusing, Pennsylvania on May 29, 2025, Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) made a significant announcement through their President and CEO, Anthony J. Gabello. The Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.32 per share for the second quarter. Shareholders can anticipate this dividend payment on June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) declares $0.32 Q2 dividend per share, payable on June 30, 2025. CEO Anthony J. Gabello announced.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a prominent provider of AI-infused smart glasses, waveguides, and Augmented Reality (AR) solutions, announced a partnership with Ramblr, a German AI startup specializing in leveraging video intelligence for automation purposes. The collaboration seeks to combine Vuzix's expertise in AI-powered smart glasses with Ramblr's innovative video intelligence technology. This venture aims to enhance automation capabilities in various sectors by integrating advanced artificial intelligence into wearable devices.
news.headline: Vuzix partners with Ramblr to develop AI assistants for frontline workers using smart glasses.

news.summary: Analyst Mike Cikos from Needham reaffirmed a Buy rating on Nutanix (NASDAQ: NTNX) with a price target of $92. The company recently revealed a third-quarter adjusted EPS of $0.42, beating the expected $0.38 estimate. Additionally, their sales for the quarter totaled $638.98 million, surpassing the anticipated $626.00 million. Nutanix is projecting fourth-quarter revenue between $635 million and $645 million. They have also increased their FY25 sales guidance to $2.52 billion. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nutanix's analyst sees upside, maintains Buy rating with $92 price forecast. Q3 EPS $0.42, sales $638.98M, Q4 revenue $635M-$645M, FY25 guidance $2.52B.

Nvidia made significant progress by surpassing its entry point. The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline. Noteworthy initial public offerings displayed a mixed performance.
news.headline: Stock market dips despite court ruling most Trump tariffs illegal; Nvidia surges; mixed IPOs showcased. Dow down.

news.summary: On Thursday, stocks linked to the artificial intelligence sector saw an increase in value following positive guidance from Nvidia regarding the demand for AI data center services. Nvidia's strong quarterly performance boosted confidence in the sector, leading to a rise in related stocks. The surge in these stocks signals investor optimism in the growth potential of the AI megatrend.
news.headline: Nvidia's 'robust' quarter boosts AI data center stocks; market responds positively.

news.summary: A company based in Hong Kong, Futu, exceeded expectations in the first quarter. Additionally, its subsidiary Moomoo is set to broaden its cryptocurrency services to the U.S. On another front, Cantor Equity Partners successfully raised funds for its Twenty One bitcoin project. The move signifies Futu's strategic entry into the U.S. crypto industry, while Cantor Equity's fundraising efforts will bolster its Bitcoin venture.
news.headline: Hong Kong's Futu surpasses Q1 expectations with expansion of crypto services to the U.S. through its subsidiary Moomoo, while Cantor Equity secures funding for its Twenty One bitcoin venture.

news.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly higher midway through trading, with the S&P 500 up 0.4% at 5,910.10. The Dow rose 0.03% to 42,113.07, and the NASDAQ jumped 0.59% to 19,213.22. Real estate shares surged by 0.9%, while communication services stocks fell by 0.5%. Best Buy Co Inc reported disappointing first-quarter results, with sales down 1% to $8.77 billion, missing estimates of $9.22 billion. Adjusted earnings were $1.15, below the consensus of $1.31, leading to a revised earnings guidance from $6.20-$6.60 per share to $6.15-$6.30 per share for fiscal 2026, compared to a consensus of $6.13 per share. Sales guidance was lowered from $41.4-$42.2 billion to $41.1-$41.9 billion, under the $41.44 billion consensus. More on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Crude oil falls over 1%; Best Buy reports downbeat Q1 results with sales down 1% to $8.77B and adjusted earnings at $1.15. Stocks mostly higher, with the Dow at 42,113.07, NASDAQ at 19,213.22, and S&P 500 at 5,910.10.

news.summary: Apparel retailer The Gap, Inc. (NYSE: GAP) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on May 29. Analysts predict earnings of 45 cents per share for the quarter, a growth from the previous year's 41 cents per share. The financial report also anticipates quarterly revenue of $3.42 billion, up from $3.39 billion in the same period last year. Furthermore, Gap's board sanctioned a dividend of 16.5 cents per share for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, as disclosed on May 20. Closing at $28.24 on Wednesday, Gap's shares experienced a 0.7% drop. Stay updated with more details on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Gap Inc. expected to report Q1 earnings of 45 cents/share on revenue of $3.42 billion. Shares fell 0.7% to $28.24.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Flexa and Nexus have partnered to facilitate Litecoin transactions in the real world. Nexus Wallet users can now make instant, secure payments at over 41,000 locations in North America using the Flexa SDK integration. This collaboration aims to enhance the purchasing power of digital assets and streamline the payment process for users.
news.headline: Flexa and Nexus Wallet partner for effortless Litecoin payments at 41,000 locations in North America.

news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, on May 29, 2025, Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) made the decision to halt its financial projections for the third quarter and full fiscal year of 2025. The company released a statement on the same day specifying the reasons behind this action.
news.headline: Synopsys, Inc. suspends financial guidance for Q3 and full fiscal year 2025 amid BIS letter.

news.summary: Located in Downers Grove, Illinois, Sevan Multi-Site Solutions, Inc. (Sevan) has proudly attained Platinum-level recognition in the Associated Builders and Contractors’ STEP Safety Management System. This program, in existence for over 30 years, offers construction companies a structured approach to evaluating, enhancing, and establishing top-tier safety initiatives. Their achievement in STEP reflects a safety performance that surpasses national standards significantly, being almost six times safer than the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics' data.
news.headline: Sevan Multi-Site Solutions achieves Platinum-level safety status with ABC STEP program, 6x safer than national average.

news.summary: In June, vacationers are invited to enjoy thrilling activities, sandy shores, and other attractions in BILOXI, Miss. The Coastal Mississippi region is beckoning travelers as the days get sunnier and the mercury rises. The area offers a range of experiences for adventure seekers, beach bums, and nature lovers. The allure of the Great... awaits visitors looking to embark on exciting escapades.
news.headline: Celebrate Great Outdoors Month in Coastal Mississippi with adventures and sunny beaches. BILOXI, Miss., May 29, 2025.

news.summary: In a report titled "Worldwide Market for Point-of-Care Diagnostic Tests, 12th Edition", leading publisher Kalorama Information revealed that the global point-of-care (POC) diagnostics market exceeded $36 billion in 2024. This substantial figure showcases the growing significance of POC diagnostics in the healthcare industry. The report, based in Arlington, Va., provides a comprehensive analysis of the market trends, indicating a notable increase in demand for these tests.
news.headline: Global POC diagnostics market exceeds $36B in 2024, forecasted steady growth reaching $36B by 2029.

news.summary: In Dublin, the global liquid fertilizers market has experienced significant growth, with a value of US$14.54 billion in 2024. The market is projected to reach US$19.00 billion by 2030. The comprehensive report, "Liquid Fertilizers Market: Analysis By Type, By Crop Type, By Production Process, By Application, By Region Size and Trends with Forecast up to 2030," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This market is anticipated to see continued expansion in the coming years, driven by various intersecting trends.
news.headline: Liquid fertilizers market is set to reach $19 billion by 2030 as U.S. maintains dominance in North America. - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
